evals.prompt: Implement annotation anchoring that survives document version changes
evals.expected_output: Multi-signal locator system with position, text, chapterRef, and fallback strategy
assertions: locator uses multiple signals for re-anchoring

evals.prompt: Fix annotation drift caused by document reformatting
evals.expected_output: Re-anchoring logic updated to handle formatting changes with fuzzy text matching
assertions: event handlers are cleaned up on unmount
telemetry logs load failures with trace IDs

evals.prompt: Optimize document rendering performance for large files
evals.expected_output: Lazy loading implemented for document assets, single rendition reused, listeners cleaned up
assertions: memory leaks are prevented by handler cleanup
